rule_adherence.notes: fs.readFile stays in main process behind typed IPC/contextBridge, TipTap with starter-kit+link, every-layout Center/Stack with logical properties, modular-scale tokens and no disallowed px all respect the binding rules.

simplicity.notes: Clean and minimal, though categoriseFile is called both in the effect and again during render and the cancelled-flag fetch could be tightened.

spec_compliance.notes: Loads/renders .md via TipTap, routes non-.md to UnsupportedPane with exact copy, Vitest gate test, ~60ch Center measure, EmptyState, and inline read-error message all satisfied.

visual_posture.notes: Prose constrained to --measure via Center, token-driven heading/code/blockquote styling with mono font for code matches the editor-pane spec.

summary: Solid markdown-viewing slice meeting every acceptance criterion and binding rule; only minor redundancy in the categoriseFile call keeps simplicity from a perfect score.
